name: Fire Spin
text: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokemon.

name: Hydro Pump
text: Does more damage for each Water Energy attached.

name: Psychic
text: Does more damage for each Energy on the opponent.

name: Thunder Jolt
text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokemon damages itself.

name: Quick Attack
text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does more damage.

name: Dragon Gale
text: This attack also damages your Bench.

name: Shadow Room
text: Place damage counters on one of your opponent's Pokemon.

name: Haunt
text: Move a damage counter from this Pokemon to one of your opponent's Pokemon.
